links.source_location: FSM state must be scoped by group_id
shopping list not scaled to persons because base portions unknown
unlimited json-file logs would fill the 45 GB disk
aiogram long polling shutdown exceeds default 10s; SIGKILL causes false BOT DOWN alert
prevents the false red alert the docker-events watcher would send on exit 137
both protect the small disk from filling
